title: pyrus gotlandica
intro: Pyrus gotlandica, also known as the Gotland pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the Baltic region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and fever. The health benefits of Pyrus gotlandica include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for use.
